alerts.headline: Frost Advisory issued April 25 at 12:46AM PDT until April 25 at 10:00AM PDT by NWS Seattle WA
alerts.description:
* WHAT...Temperatures as low as 32 will result in frost formation.

* WHERE...Southern Hood Canal, Lowlands of Lewis and Southern
Thurston Counties, Lowlands of Pierce and Southern King Counties,
and Olympia and Southern Puget Sound.

* WHEN...Until 10 AM PDT this morning.

* IMPACTS...Frost could harm sensitive outdoor vegetation. Sensitive
outdoor plants may be killed if left uncovered.
alerts.instruction: Take steps now to protect tender plants from the cold.
